applicationIdentifiers.description: Amount Payable per unit of measure single monetary area (variable measure trade item)
applicationIdentifiers.note: "The fourth digit of this AI indicates the number of decimal places. For example if the fourth digit is 3 the decimal is in the 3rd position (nnn.nnn), if the fourth digit is 1 the decimal is in the 1st position (nnnnn.n). See GS1 General Specifications for full details."
applicationIdentifiers.title: PRICE/UoM
